prompt: A premium mineral water advertisement poster featuring a fresh-faced young man in a relaxed white and yellow linen outfit standing confidently beside a giant crystal-clear mineral water bottle nearly 3x her height, covered in realistic water droplets with the “SPRING” label clearly visible. The scene is set against a clean arctic-white AND FOREST GREEN minimal background filled with floating ice crystals, soft mist, and dynamic water splash effects creating a refreshing luxury commercial atmosphere. Large crisp sans-serif typography reading “SPRING ” appears subtly oversized in light blue across the background, while the tagline “DROP FROM VALLEY.” is placed elegantly at the bottom. In the top-right corner, small grey text reads “Designed BY SHAMUS.” Photorealistic lighting, ultra-clean product advertising aesthetic, glossy reflections, premium hydration campaign style, minimal yet cinematic composition.
